description: Epistemic governance framework for model-agnostic AI evaluation and audit.

application_context.name: ODIkS
application_context.description: Open Digital Infrastructures for school authorities (validation case)

migration_from_dns.notes: Legacy DNS v2.1 documentation preserved for reference.

structure.01_governance: Safety layer scripts, AI Act mapping, hash chains, integrity checks
structure.02_infrastructure: Technical metrics, Δdiv definitions, heatmaps, validation matrices
structure.03_pedagogy: Case study 'The Copilot Crash' (bilingual), teaching materials
structure.04_archive_legacy: Original DNS files and old repository version

bilingual.method: Separate de/ and en/ subfolders under each main directory
